creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was able to build with LibreSSL with this in my make.conf:

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=libressl

root@132amd64-dvl:~ # ldd /usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd
/usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd:
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x39eff9736000)
	libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x39eff91c3000)
	libbacfind-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbacfind-11.0.6.so (0x39eff9e67000)
	libbaccfg-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbaccfg-11.0.6.so (0x39effa074000)
	libbac-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbac-11.0.6.so (0x39effad3c000)
	libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x39effc61a000)
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x39effb521000)
	libwrap.so.6 => /usr/lib/libwrap.so.6 (0x39effbfd7000)
	libssl.so.53 => /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.53 (0x39effcf75000)
	libcrypto.so.50 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.50 (0x39effe24e000)
	liblzo2.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/liblzo2.so.2 (0x39effd55f000)
	libc++.so.1 => /usr/lib/libc++.so.1 (0x39effebf8000)
	libcxxrt.so.1 => /lib/libcxxrt.so.1 (0x39efff732000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x39f00002c000)
	libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x39f001168000)
	[vdso] (0x7ffffffff5d0)
root@132amd64-dvl:~ # pkg which /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.53
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.53 was installed by package libressl-3.7.3
